name: Deploy to GCS

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - uses: google-github-actions/auth@v1
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_SA_KEY }}

      - uses: google-github-actions/upload-cloud-storage@v1
        with:
          path: .
          destination: aditya_course
          glob: '*.html,*.css'
